products_list.name: 21k Gold Heritage Hand Chain/Kaff
products_list.description:
Grace your hands with a timeless masterpiece of Middle Eastern elegance. Crafted from solid, high-purity 21k yellow gold, our hand chains (also known as kaffs or slave bracelets) drape beautifully over the back of the hand, linking a delicate finger ring to a coordinating wrist bracelet. Featuring intricate filigree work and polished accents, this statement piece adds a captivating, traditional touch to bridal attire and festive celebrations. A stunning symbol of luxury, heritage, and refined craftsmanship.

Material: 21k Solid Yellow Gold
Included Items: Please refer to the product image for the exact matching items included in this set (typically includes the hand chain with its integrated ring/bracelet as pictured).
Craftsmanship: Hand-finished filigree styling with polished gold accents.
Occasion: Perfect for brides, henna parties, weddings, and traditional celebrations.
